name: caps-claude
description: Consultadd Public Services skills for the Consultadd team — RFP authoring, eligibility checking, multi-expert proposal drafting.

plugins.name: consultadd-rfp
plugins.description: Multi-expert RFP authoring workflow. Parses RFPs, injects firm boilerplate, runs eligibility checks, dispatches specialist drafters, reviews, cross-verifies, and produces submission-ready proposals — with human-in-the-loop gates at eligibility, pricing, capability claims, and attestations.
